commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are proof coverage and a credential-retention tradeoff, not a narrow mechanical code repair.; Needs attention: No supply-chain execution concern was found, but the diff adds an unbounded process-level cache of credential-bearing device auth stores. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a device-auth mtime/size read cache, promise-caches async session realpath lookup, bulk-loads APNs registrations for exec approval pushes, and parallelizes tracked temp-dir cleanup.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +96. Total +151 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a performance/refactor PR rather than a bug report with a current-main failing reproduction. Proof was assessed from the PR body and source diff instead.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are proof coverage and a credential-retention tradeoff, not a narrow mechanical code repair.
